km.Ely, Cambridgeshire, England: អេលី, ខាមព្រីdហ្គeស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Jane於1150年出生在英國坎布利其爾埃利。她於大約1169年與Francis Cox在英國坎布利其爾埃利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1218年在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane于1150年出生在英国坎布利其爾埃利。她于大约1169年与Francis Cox在英国坎布利其爾埃利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1218年在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain

It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Jane was born in 1150, in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England. She married Francis Cox about 1169, in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1218, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane est née en 1150, à Ely, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Francis Cox environ 1169, à Ely, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1218, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Jane wurde 1150 in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1169 in Ely, Cambridgeshire, England Francis Cox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1218 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Jane è nata il nel 1150 nel Ely, Cambridgeshire, England. Lei sposato Francis Cox circa 1169, nel Ely, Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1218, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.Ely, Cambridgeshire, England: イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエリー
ja.lifeSummary: Janeは1150年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエリーで生まれた。約1169年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアエリーでFrancis Coxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1218年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane(은)는 1150년 영국 캄브리지실르 엘리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1169년 영국 캄브리지실르 엘리에서 Francis Cox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1218년 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jane nasceu em 1150, em Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Francis Cox aproximadamente 1169, em Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1218, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane родилась в 1150 г. в местности эли, камбриджешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Cox около 1169 г. в местности эли, камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1218 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Jane nació en 1150, en Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Francis Cox aproximadamente 1169, en Ely, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1218, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
